title: Is the Lance organic
wikitext:
[]: Is the Lance organic?             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Wed Oct 18, 2006 8:59 pm I was watching the DC, and i saw this lance do this funny gill action thing as it penetrated the field (cap would be appreciated) can some1 explain this? thanks

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Wed Oct 18, 2006 9:39 pm The lance is orgasmic. It's also made of confusion and making no sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Wed Oct 18, 2006 9:41 pm According to the CI Reichu translated, yes. It apparently has a will of its own. Did you also notice it roaring one Eva 00 threw it? Although this doesn't really explain all the crazy shit it does in EoE.

[]: Re: Is the Lance organic?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 18, 2006 11:52 pm InvaderRen wrote: I was watching the DC, and i saw this lance do this funny gill action thing as it penetrated the field (cap would be appreciated)

[]: Re: Is the Lance organic?             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Oct 19, 2006 12:53 am Reichu wrote: http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-22/22_C274B_anim_50pc.gif

[]: Re: NYA!             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 19, 2006 1:03 am Evangelion Oi! wrote: going slightly off topic....

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 19, 2006 1:38 pm I can solve the Spear of Longinus mystery right here and now. It is an organic, it has a will that is fairly apathetic, and uses a PD (plot device) organ, which is powered by various narcotic substances (which also form it's ego, there by giving substance to it's shape.) (I need a gif of baby Shinji nodding his head in agreement. )

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Thu Oct 19, 2006 2:29 pm yea, i noticed that freakish roar, but i was POSITIVE that it was Unit-00 roaring in respose to the sheer energy need to get that thing to break earth's gravity can somebody explain the origins of CI? Im not familar with it thanks

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 19, 2006 2:48 pm InvaderRen wrote: yea, i noticed that freakish roar, but i was POSITIVE that it was Unit-00 roaring in respose to the sheer energy need to get that thing to break earth's gravity

[]:             Quote Post by Lujerker » Tue Oct 24, 2006 11:24 am Hi... The question is.... what participation had in a unified god...? (Lilith + Adam)... Adam Lance of Longinus Lilith That's the order ????

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Tue Oct 24, 2006 12:30 pm Um no, the upper one is Unit 01, also the land is not so small as the editor of the original pic has it to be here. I don't think the lance has something to do with it's separation from Lilith. I think that Eva 00 roars when it throws the lance, the timing seems just fine and also doesn't unit 02 roar in EoE under normal synch? The lance can't roar :s (but it can do all the other sorts of things :S)

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Tue Oct 24, 2006 1:57 pm Six Winged Angel wrote: and also doesn't unit 02 roar in EoE under normal synch?

[]:             Quote Post by Lujerker » Tue Oct 24, 2006 2:26 pm Um no, the upper one is Unit 01

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Wed Oct 25, 2006 12:07 am felineki wrote: Six Winged Angel wrote: and also doesn't unit 02 roar in EoE under normal synch?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 25, 2006 7:52 am Why the heck is there a Spear overlaid onto the Sho/Lilith pic? I honestly couldn't understand what was being said in the last few posts.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Oct 25, 2006 1:38 pm Lujerker wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Oct 25, 2006 1:55 pm Reichu wrote: Why the heck is there a Spear overlaid onto the Sho/Lilith pic? I honestly couldn't understand what was being said in the last few posts.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Wed Oct 25, 2006 3:18 pm lol the lance is a control device blah blah Just wondering, exactly what are the contradictions/time paradoxes that the CI's description of LnY causes? Could, say, Reichu, explain this to me, the ignorant n00b?

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Wed Oct 25, 2006 4:57 pm MaggotMaster wrote: lol the lance is a control device blah blah Just wondering, exactly what are the contradictions/time paradoxes that the CI's description of LnY causes? Could, say, Reichu, explain this to me, the ignorant n00b?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 25, 2006 8:32 pm But did it actually make any sense? That's what I wanna know.
